title: Apple to finally catch up with Samsung and Google, plans to bring 4 new AI editing features to Photos app: Report
snippet: Apple is set to enhance its photo-editing tools for iPhone, iPad, and Mac with AI features in the upcoming iOS 27 update.The new tools could include Extend, Enhance, and Reframe.

title: iPhone Fold's first comparison video releases even before launch, reveals exact dimensions and an ultra-thin chassis

title: Apple confirms iOS Weather App outage: Is it working now? What we know
snippet: Apple's Weather app went down for iPhone users across the US on Tuesday, with the disruption lasting nearly four hours before engineers restored service.

title: MeitY flags VPN providers, intermediaries enabling access to blocked betting and prediction platforms: Check advisory
snippet: The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology issued an advisory to VPN providers, urging them to prevent access to illegal online betting platforms. It emphasised due diligence obligations and warned of potential legal consequences for non-compliance with the IT Act and other gaming laws.

title: Flipkart 'Sasa Lele' sale dates announced: iPhone 17, Galaxy S25 deals and bank offers revealed
snippet: Flipkart's summer sale starts on May 9, 2026, with early access for Plus and Black members on May 8. The e-commerce platform has also announced offers for the sale including a 10% discount on SBI Credit Cards and 15% for Black customers.

title: MacBook prices slashed: These premium Apple laptops are affordable now

title: Amazon tells its engineers to avoid the 'bleeding edge' in new 6-point AI adoption guidelines
snippet: Amazon is formalizing AI integration into its engineering culture with six AI-native tenets. The guidelines aims to optimize AI use without compromising on understanding or traceability.

title: India seeks Mythos access; Eternal's strong Q4

title: Elon Musk says OpenAI was his idea, before executives looted it
snippet: In a high-stakes courtroom drama, Elon Musk has launched a lawsuit against OpenAI and its executives, alleging that they've strayed from the altruistic vision that inspired the company's creation. Musk maintains that he established OpenAI as a nonprofit venture aimed at uplifting humanity.

title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
snippet: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running.
